patches.summary: Hand-built 8 cross-campaign aggregation commands that read the local SQLite store: stale, overlap, mailbox-burnout, reply-velocity, deliv-drift, reach-budget, roll-up, reply-classify.
patches.reason: Smartlead's API has no global lead view or cross-campaign endpoints; these commands compute their results from the synced local store and are the differentiating value over the absorbed REST surface.
